# FolderMetadataManager

## listFolderMetadata

`GET /folders/{folder_id}/metadata`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `folder_id` | path | `string` | yes |
| `view` | query | `string` | no |

**Returns:** `Metadatas`

**Example**

```ts

```
